endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/locations/{locationName}/syncDatabaseIds
endpoints.description: Gets a collection of sync database ids.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{databaseName}/syncGroups
